summary: Iteration 53 (TheraVoca admin team + patient/therapist UX) tested. Backend: 13/13 pytest cases in test_iteration53_admin_team.py PASS (master pwd, JWT login, invite/list/reset/remove, dup 409, short-pw 400, deactivated user 401, both auth modes accepted by require_admin). Frontend: Verified the new Admin team-email login + Master-password mode toggle, /admin → tab-team invite flow (created `ui_*@theravoca.test` row), /admin → All Providers columns editor (toggle + Save-as-default writes localStorage `tv_admin_provider_default_cols`). Patient results page (token URL): your-referral-panel + referral-toggle + submit-another-request-section/btn render correctly. PatientPortal/IntakeForm/TherapistEditProfile preview features verified via source-code inspection (testids wired up exactly as spec'd) — couldn't UI-walk all steps because intake uses pill buttons instead of radios.
action_items: Spec said 14 column toggles in All Providers editor; the implementation actually has 16 toggles (Provider, Status, License, Reviews, Rate, Specialties, Phone, Format, Office address, Languages, Age groups, Client types, Modalities, Website, Subscription, Joined). Update the spec/PRD or trim the registry depending on intent — no functional bug.

PatientPortal.jsx line 203 has a stale JSDoc comment saying 'Visual 5-step timeline: Submitted → Verified → Matched → Applied → Results ready.' Actual implementation now has 4 steps. Update comment to match.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard.jsx is ~4000+ lines (line numbers around 4032 referenced) — exceeds 700-line guideline. Recommend splitting TeamPanel, ProviderTableControls, columns editor, etc. into separate files for maintainability.
matchGaps logic and ReviewPreviewModal are properly co-located but worth extracting to small utility/component files since IntakeForm and PatientResults are growing.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on validated paths (admin login, team invite, provider columns editor, results-page panels, source-verified preview modals)

test_credentials: Master admin pw: admin123!. Live team account created during test: frontend_1777377825@theravoca.test / frontend1 (and a chained ui_*@theravoca.test from UI invite flow, both still in admin_users).
seed_data_creation: Created 2 admin_users records: frontend_1777377825@theravoca.test (CLI invite), ui_1461897@theravoca.test (UI invite). The lifecycle pytest also creates a fresh team_<ts>@theravoca.test per run and deactivates it.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration-53 backend endpoints verified working at https://care-matcher-1.preview.emergentagent.com/api. Admin login UI at /admin defaults to Team-email mode; switch via 'Master password' tab. Provider columns editor lives under tab-all-therapists (NOT tab-providers). Patient results page state at the seeded token URL is currently 'matching in progress' (no therapist cards rendered yet) so gaps-{i} cannot be visually verified — code path exists in PatientResults.jsx via matchGaps helper. IntakeForm preview modal couldn't be reached via heuristic walker because it uses pill buttons; if you need full UI coverage, drive each step explicitly by clicking the visible pill labels.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. The two action items are spec-vs-implementation mismatches (column count) and a stale comment.
